requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Maldives Regulatory Gap, NFPA 855, and Project-Specific Fire Code Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——马尔代夫监管差距、NFPA 855及项目专属消防规范要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——馬爾地夫監管差距、NFPA 855及項目專屬消防規範要求

summary.en: Maldives does not have a published standalone national fire code equivalent to the NFPA series or the Singapore Fire Code. Fire safety regulation is managed by the Maldives Police Service Fire and Rescue Service and, for larger projects, coordinated through the Ministry of Home Affairs and project approval processes. No confirmed Maldives national adoption of NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) specifically for BESS has been identified from official sources as of the dataset date. However, ADB/AIIB-financed Maldives BESS project specifications routinely reference NFPA 855 as the fire-safety installation code for stationary energy storage, as it is the internationally dominant standard. Project design documentation submitted for MEA approval and utility connection is expected to include NFPA 855-aligned fire safety design. The practical fire-safety requirements for Maldives BESS installations include: thermal runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, fire suppression system design (where required by project specification), emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances per NFPA 855. The absence of a national fire safety authority with published BESS-specific standards means requirements are determined project-by-project; early engagement with the relevant authority and the project owner is essential.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫没有等同于NFPA系列或新加坡消防规范的已公布独立国家消防规范。消防安全监管由马尔代夫警察局消防和救援服务部门管理，大型项目通过内政部和项目审批流程协调。截至本数据集日期，未从官方来源确认马尔代夫国家层面专门针对BESS采纳NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）。然而，ADB/亚投行资助的马尔代夫BESS项目规格通常将NFPA 855作为固定式储能消防安全安装规范引用，因为它是国际上占主导地位的标准。提交MEA审批和公用事业并网的项目设计文件预计须包含符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计。马尔代夫BESS安装的实际消防安全要求包括：热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、灭火系统设计（若项目规格要求）、紧急停机程序及符合NFPA 855的隔离距离。缺乏发布BESS专属标准的国家消防安全机构意味着要求逐个项目确定；尽早与相关主管机关和项目业主接触至关重要。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫沒有等同於NFPA系列或新加坡消防規範的已公布獨立國家消防規範。消防安全監管由馬爾地夫警察局消防和救援服務部門管理，大型項目通過內政部和項目審批流程協調。截至本數據集日期，未從官方來源確認馬爾地夫國家層面專門針對BESS採納NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）。然而，ADB/亞投行資助的馬爾地夫BESS項目規格通常將NFPA 855作為固定式儲能消防安全安裝規範引用，因為它是國際上佔主導地位的標準。提交MEA審批和公用事業併網的項目設計文件預計須包含符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計。馬爾地夫BESS安裝的實際消防安全要求包括：熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、滅火系統設計（若項目規格要求）、緊急停機程序及符合NFPA 855的隔離距離。缺乏發布BESS專屬標準的國家消防安全機構意味著要求逐個項目確定；盡早與相關主管機關和項目業主接觸至關重要。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; routinely referenced in Maldives ADB/AIIB project specifications; national adoption by Maldives unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with project authority)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (commonly referenced in international project specifications for BESS fire suppression)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (fire alarm and detection system reference)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level fire-safety standard expected in project specifications)
Maldives Police Service Fire and Rescue Service — fire safety authority; project-specific approval required; no published standalone BESS fire code confirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through a combination of mandatory product standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority (fire brigade) approval procedures under the Fire Prevention Law. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised in Maldives project specifications as equivalent to NFPA 855-aligned design documentation. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for Maldives project review and MEA approval.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性产品标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由《消防法》下的地方消防机构（消防大队）审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序在马尔代夫项目规格中不被认可为等同于NFPA 855对齐设计文件。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在马尔代夫项目审查和MEA审批中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性產品標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由《消防法》下的地方消防機構（消防大隊）審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序在馬爾地夫項目規格中不被認可為等同於NFPA 855對齊設計文件。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在馬爾地夫項目審查和MEA審批中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level safety including fire requirements)
Fire Prevention Law of the People's Republic of China (消防法) — governing framework for project-level fire authority review in China

gap.en: Gap: Maldives has no published national fire code specific to BESS, and the fire-safety authority has limited capacity for BESS-specific technical review. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards is not sufficient for Maldives ADB/AIIB project specifications that reference NFPA 855. Additional Maldives-specific considerations: (a) space-constrained atoll installations — NFPA 855 separation distances and egress requirements must be applied to very small-footprint island sites where container siting adjacent to community buildings may be unavoidable; (b) sea-freight-only access — emergency response capabilities are severely limited on outer atolls (no fire truck, no specialist BESS fire suppression equipment); BESS fire-safety design must prioritise autonomous passive suppression and containment, not reliance on external emergency response; (c) humidity and salt-air effects on fire detection systems — optical smoke detectors and ionisation detectors require maintenance schedules adapted to Maldives marine environment. Project teams should: engage the relevant project fire safety authority at the earliest stage; prepare NFPA 855-aligned fire safety design; ensure suppression system components are certified by internationally recognised laboratories (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV).
gap.zh: 差距：马尔代夫没有针对BESS发布的国家消防规范，消防安全机构的BESS专属技术审查能力有限。基于GB标准的中国BESS消防安全文件不足以满足引用NFPA 855的马尔代夫ADB/亚投行项目规格。马尔代夫特有的额外考量：（a）空间受限的环礁安装场地——NFPA 855隔离距离和疏散要求须应用于极小占地面积的岛屿场地，在这些场地中，集装箱紧邻社区建筑可能不可避免；（b）仅海运通达——外部环礁的紧急响应能力极其有限（无消防车、无专业BESS灭火设备）；BESS消防安全设计须优先考虑自主被动抑制和封堵，而非依赖外部紧急响应；（c）湿度和盐雾对火灾探测系统的影响——光学烟雾探测器和电离探测器须采用适应马尔代夫海洋环境的维护计划。项目团队应：在最早阶段与相关项目消防安全机构接触；准备符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计；确保灭火系统部件经国际知名实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV）认证。
gap.zht: 差距：馬爾地夫沒有針對BESS發布的國家消防規範，消防安全機構的BESS專屬技術審查能力有限。基於GB標準的中國BESS消防安全文件不足以滿足引用NFPA 855的馬爾地夫ADB/亞投行項目規格。馬爾地夫特有的額外考量：（a）空間受限的環礁安裝場地——NFPA 855隔離距離和疏散要求須應用於極小佔地面積的島嶼場地，在這些場地中，貨櫃緊鄰社區建築可能不可避免；（b）僅海運通達——外部環礁的緊急響應能力極其有限（無消防車、無專業BESS滅火設備）；BESS消防安全設計須優先考慮自主被動抑制和封堵，而非依賴外部緊急響應；（c）濕度和鹽霧對火災探測系統的影響——光學煙霧探測器和電離探測器須採用適應馬爾地夫海洋環境的維護計畫。項目團隊應：在最早階段與相關項目消防安全機構接觸；準備符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計；確保滅火系統部件經國際知名實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV）認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice for ADB/AIIB-funded installations — NFPA 855-aligned fire safety documentation is expected in project specifications; formal national adoption of NFPA 855 for BESS by Maldives authorities has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with the relevant authority and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; Chinese domestic fire approvals are not recognised in Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Maldives has no published national BESS fire installation code, but ADB/AIIB project specifications routinely reference NFPA 855. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation is not sufficient for Maldives project acceptance. Critical Maldives-specific design considerations — outer-atoll access limitations requiring autonomous passive fire suppression, extreme humidity affecting detector maintenance, and severe space constraints at island sites — go beyond standard NFPA 855 design assumptions. Engage the project fire safety authority and the project owner at the earliest stage to define the applicable fire code and design requirements before system layout or equipment specification is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马尔代夫没有已公布的国家BESS消防安装规范，但ADB/亚投行项目规格通常引用NFPA 855。中国GB标准消防安全文件不足以满足马尔代夫项目验收要求。马尔代夫特有的关键设计考量——外部环礁通达性限制要求自主被动灭火、极端湿度影响探测器维护及岛屿场地严重空间限制——超出了标准NFPA 855设计假设。在确定系统布局或设备规格之前，在项目最早阶段与项目消防安全机构和项目业主接触，明确适用消防规范及设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬爾地夫沒有已公布的國家BESS消防安裝規範，但ADB/亞投行項目規格通常引用NFPA 855。中國GB標準消防安全文件不足以滿足馬爾地夫項目驗收要求。馬爾地夫特有的關鍵設計考量——外部環礁通達性限制要求自主被動滅火、極端濕度影響探測器維護及島嶼場地嚴重空間限制——超出了標準NFPA 855設計假設。在確定系統布局或設備規格之前，在項目最早階段與項目消防安全機構和項目業主接觸，明確適用消防規範及設計要求。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal Runaway Containment and Passive Suppression — Critical Design Requirement for Remote Atoll BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 热失控封堵与被动抑制——偏远环礁BESS关键设计要求
requirement_topic.zht: 熱失控封堵與被動抑制——偏遠環礁BESS關鍵設計要求

summary.en: Outer-atoll BESS installations in Maldives face a unique emergency response constraint: there are no fire brigades with BESS-specific equipment or training on most inhabited outer atolls. FENAKA-operated outer-island grids may have populations of 500–3,000 people. In the event of a BESS thermal runaway cascade and fire, external intervention will be delayed by hours or unavailable. This makes passive thermal runaway containment — module-to-module and rack-to-rack propagation prevention — and autonomous fire suppression the primary safety design requirement, not supplementary. ADB/AIIB project specifications and MEA project approvals for outer-atoll BESS are expected to require: (a) NFPA 855-aligned thermal runaway mitigation design with documented module-level containment; (b) either gaseous suppression (HFC or inert gas) or engineered passive containment per project-specific fire safety analysis; (c) gas detection with automated BMS disconnect and ventilation interlocks; (d) emergency shutdown procedures operable by untrained local personnel. IEC 62619 thermal runaway propagation test requirements (TR propagation test per IEC 62619:2022 Annex E) are the cell and module baseline evidence for containment claims.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫外部环礁BESS安装面临独特的紧急响应限制：大多数有人居住的外部环礁上没有配备BESS专属设备或培训的消防大队。FENAKA运营的外岛电网服务人口可能在500至3,000人之间。在BESS热失控级联和火灾发生时，外部干预将延迟数小时或根本无法实现。这使得被动热失控封堵——模组间和机架间蔓延预防——以及自主灭火成为主要安全设计要求，而非补充措施。外部环礁BESS的ADB/亚投行项目规格和MEA项目审批预计将要求：（a）符合NFPA 855的热失控缓解设计，附有记录在案的模组级封堵；（b）气体抑制（HFC或惰性气体）或按项目专属消防安全分析设计的被动封堵；（c）带自动BMS断开和通风联锁的气体探测；（d）可由未受培训的本地人员操作的紧急停机程序。IEC 62619热失控蔓延测试要求（IEC 62619:2022附录E热失控蔓延测试）是封堵声明的电芯和模组基准证据。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫外部環礁BESS安裝面臨獨特的緊急響應限制：大多數有人居住的外部環礁上沒有配備BESS專屬設備或培訓的消防大隊。FENAKA運營的外島電網服務人口可能在500至3,000人之間。在BESS熱失控級聯和火災發生時，外部干預將延遲數小時或根本無法實現。這使得被動熱失控封堵——模組間和機架間蔓延預防——以及自主滅火成為主要安全設計要求，而非補充措施。外部環礁BESS的ADB/亞投行項目規格和MEA項目審批預計將要求：（a）符合NFPA 855的熱失控緩解設計，附有記錄在案的模組級封堵；（b）氣體抑制（HFC或惰性氣體）或按項目專屬消防安全分析設計的被動封堵；（c）帶自動BMS斷開和通風聯鎖的氣體探測；（d）可由未受培訓的本地人員操作的緊急停機程序。IEC 62619熱失控蔓延測試要求（IEC 62619:2022附錄E熱失控蔓延測試）是封堵聲明的電芯和模組基準證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 Annex E — Thermal Runaway Propagation Test (cell and module-level TR propagation containment evidence)
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (Section 4 hazard mitigation design including thermal runaway and propagation mitigation)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level TR hazard assessment framework)
IEC 60079 series — Explosive Atmospheres (gas detection equipment standards applicable where flammable gas accumulation from BESS thermal runaway is assessed)

summary.en: Chinese BESS fire safety and thermal runaway requirements are addressed in GB 44240-2024 (cell and module level, including thermal runaway propagation provisions) and GB/T 36558-2023 (system-level safety including fire suppression design for indoor and outdoor installations). Chinese domestic BESS container fire suppression systems typically use heptafluoropropane (HFP / FM-200) or aerosol-based systems that comply with China fire authority standards. These Chinese suppression system designs may be technically adequate for Maldives conditions but: (a) suppression system components must be certified by laboratories recognised in the project specification (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, or DNV); (b) GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway propagation test evidence is not directly equivalent to IEC 62619:2022 Annex E evidence — confirm with the project specification which standard's TR propagation test is required.
summary.zh: 中国BESS消防安全和热失控要求在GB 44240-2024（电芯和模组级别，包括热失控蔓延规定）和GB/T 36558-2023（系统级安全，包括室内和户外安装的灭火设计）中得到处理。中国国内BESS集装箱灭火系统通常使用符合中国消防机构标准的七氟丙烷（HFP / FM-200）或气溶胶系统。这些中国抑制系统设计在技术上可能适用于马尔代夫条件，但：（a）抑制系统部件须经项目规格中认可的实验室认证（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或DNV）；（b）GB 44240-2024热失控蔓延测试证据与IEC 62619:2022附录E证据并非直接等效——向项目规格确认要求哪个标准的热失控蔓延测试。
summary.zht: 中國BESS消防安全和熱失控要求在GB 44240-2024（電芯和模組級別，包括熱失控蔓延規定）和GB/T 36558-2023（系統級安全，包括室內和戶外安裝的滅火設計）中得到處理。中國國內BESS貨櫃滅火系統通常使用符合中國消防機構標準的七氟丙烷（HFP / FM-200）或氣溶胶系統。這些中國抑制系統設計在技術上可能適用於馬爾地夫條件，但：（a）抑制系統部件須經項目規格中認可的實驗室認證（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或DNV）；（b）GB 44240-2024熱失控蔓延測試證據與IEC 62619:2022附錄E證據並非直接等效——向項目規格確認要求哪個標準的熱失控蔓延測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes thermal runaway propagation provisions at cell and module level)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level fire suppression design requirements)

gap.en: Gap: The Maldives outer-atoll no-emergency-response constraint elevates passive fire containment from a supplementary feature to the primary safety design requirement. Chinese domestic BESS fire-safety design is typically calibrated for installations where fire brigade response is available within 10–20 minutes. For Maldives outer-atoll projects, exporters and project engineers must: (a) obtain IEC 62619:2022 Annex E thermal runaway propagation test evidence — not just GB 44240-2024 TR test evidence — for the specific cell and module configuration being supplied; (b) design an autonomous fire suppression system sized for a worst-case cascade without external intervention for the duration of an inter-island vessel response time; (c) ensure all fire suppression equipment is certified by UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, or DNV as required by the project specification; (d) prepare an emergency response plan operable by FENAKA or STELCO local operations staff with no specialist BESS fire training.
gap.zh: 差距：马尔代夫外部环礁无紧急响应约束使被动消防封堵从补充功能提升为主要安全设计要求。中国国内BESS消防安全设计通常针对10至20分钟内可获得消防大队响应的安装环境进行校准。对于马尔代夫外部环礁项目，出口商和项目工程师须：（a）为所供应的特定电芯和模组配置取得IEC 62619:2022附录E热失控蔓延测试证据——而非仅为GB 44240-2024热失控测试证据；（b）设计能够在没有外部干预的情况下应对最坏情况级联的自主灭火系统，持续时间等同于岛际船只响应时间；（c）确保所有灭火设备按项目规格要求经UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或DNV认证；（d）准备可由FENAKA或STELCO无专业BESS消防培训的本地运营人员操作的紧急响应计划。
gap.zht: 差距：馬爾地夫外部環礁無緊急響應約束使被動消防封堵從補充功能提升為主要安全設計要求。中國國內BESS消防安全設計通常針對10至20分鐘內可獲得消防大隊響應的安裝環境進行校準。對於馬爾地夫外部環礁項目，出口商和項目工程師須：（a）為所供應的特定電芯和模組配置取得IEC 62619:2022附錄E熱失控蔓延測試證據——而非僅為GB 44240-2024熱失控測試證據；（b）設計能夠在沒有外部干預的情況下應對最壞情況級聯的自主滅火系統，持續時間等同於島際船隻響應時間；（c）確保所有滅火設備按項目規格要求經UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或DNV認證；（d）準備可由FENAKA或STELCO無專業BESS消防培訓的本地運營人員操作的緊急響應計畫。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory design requirement in ADB/AIIB project specifications for outer-atoll BESS — passive containment and autonomous suppression are project-critical given absence of emergency response capability on remote atolls; formal mandatory standard not confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 TR propagation and GB/T 36558 suppression design requirements apply for Chinese domestic installations; not equivalent to IEC 62619 Annex E or NFPA 855 requirements for Maldives projects

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62619:2022 including Annex E Thermal Runaway Propagation Test

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The absence of emergency response capability on Maldives outer atolls makes autonomous passive thermal runaway containment and fire suppression the primary safety design requirement — not a supplementary feature — for BESS installed by FENAKA or STELCO on remote islands. Chinese GB 44240-2024 TR propagation evidence and domestic suppression system designs are not sufficient substitutes for IEC 62619:2022 Annex E propagation test evidence and internationally certified suppression components. Commission IEC 62619 Annex E TR propagation testing for the specific cell/module configuration and design autonomous suppression sized for extended response delays before ADB/AIIB bid submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马尔代夫外部环礁缺乏紧急响应能力，使自主被动热失控封堵和灭火成为FENAKA或STELCO在偏远岛屿安装BESS的主要安全设计要求——而非补充功能。中国GB 44240-2024热失控蔓延证据和国内抑制系统设计不足以替代IEC 62619:2022附录E蔓延测试证据和国际认证抑制部件。在ADB/亚投行投标提交前，委托针对特定电芯/模组配置进行IEC 62619附录E热失控蔓延测试，并设计应对长时间响应延迟的自主抑制系统。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬爾地夫外部環礁缺乏緊急響應能力，使自主被動熱失控封堵和滅火成為FENAKA或STELCO在偏遠島嶼安裝BESS的主要安全設計要求——而非補充功能。中國GB 44240-2024熱失控蔓延證據和國內抑制系統設計不足以替代IEC 62619:2022附錄E蔓延測試證據和國際認證抑制部件。在ADB/亞投行投標提交前，委托針對特定電芯/模組配置進行IEC 62619附錄E熱失控蔓延測試，並設計應對長時間響應延遲的自主抑制系統。

requirement_topic.en: Humidity and Salt-Air Effects on BESS Fire Detection Systems — Maldives Marine Environment Considerations
requirement_topic.zh: 湿度及盐雾对BESS火灾探测系统的影响——马尔代夫海洋环境考量
requirement_topic.zht: 濕度及鹽霧對BESS火災探測系統的影響——馬爾地夫海洋環境考量

summary.en: Fire and gas detection systems are a mandatory component of BESS fire safety design under NFPA 855 and IEC 62933-5-1. In Maldives, the marine environment — persistent humidity above 80%, salt-laden air, corrosive atmosphere within metres of the shoreline — significantly degrades the reliability of standard fire and gas detection components. Common failure modes in tropical marine environments include: false positives from condensation in optical smoke detectors; ionisation detector contamination from salt-mist particulates; electrochemical gas sensor degradation from humidity and corrosive gases; wiring and connector corrosion affecting detector reliability; and mould growth on electronics in non-air-conditioned enclosures. Project specifications for Maldives BESS are expected to require: (a) gas detection systems with humidity-compensated electrochemical sensors or catalytic bead sensors rated for marine environments; (b) smoke and heat detection to IP54 or higher; (c) stainless-steel or polymer-coated conduit, marine-grade connectors, and conformal-coated PCBs in detection electronics; (d) a maintenance schedule that includes quarterly sensor calibration and annual replacement for high-humidity tropical environments. No specific published Maldives standard for fire detection in marine BESS environments was identified as of the dataset date — requirements are project-specific.
summary.zh: 火灾和气体探测系统是NFPA 855和IEC 62933-5-1下BESS消防安全设计的强制组成部分。在马尔代夫，海洋环境——持续超过80%的湿度、含盐空气、距海岸线数米内的腐蚀性气氛——显著降低标准火灾和气体探测部件的可靠性。热带海洋环境中的常见故障模式包括：光学烟雾探测器中冷凝水造成的误报；盐雾颗粒污染电离探测器；湿度和腐蚀性气体导致电化学气体传感器性能下降；线路和连接器腐蚀影响探测器可靠性；以及非空调外壳内电子设备上的霉菌生长。马尔代夫BESS项目规格预计将要求：（a）配备湿度补偿电化学传感器或海洋环境额定催化珠传感器的气体探测系统；（b）IP54或更高防护等级的烟雾和热探测；（c）不锈钢或聚合物涂层导管、船用级连接器及探测电子设备中的涂覆PCB；（d）包含季度传感器校准和高湿热带环境年度更换的维护计划。截至本数据集日期，未发现针对海洋BESS环境中火灾探测的马尔代夫专属已公布标准——要求为项目专属。
summary.zht: 火災和氣體探測系統是NFPA 855和IEC 62933-5-1下BESS消防安全設計的強制組成部分。在馬爾地夫，海洋環境——持續超過80%的濕度、含鹽空氣、距海岸線數米內的腐蝕性氣氛——顯著降低標準火災和氣體探測部件的可靠性。熱帶海洋環境中的常見故障模式包括：光學煙霧探測器中冷凝水造成的誤報；鹽霧顆粒污染電離探測器；濕度和腐蝕性氣體導致電化學氣體傳感器性能下降；線路和連接器腐蝕影響探測器可靠性；以及非空調外殼內電子設備上的黴菌生長。馬爾地夫BESS項目規格預計將要求：（a）配備濕度補償電化學傳感器或海洋環境額定催化珠傳感器的氣體探測系統；（b）IP54或更高防護等級的煙霧和熱探測；（c）不鏽鋼或聚合物塗層導管、船用級連接器及探測電子設備中的塗覆PCB；（d）包含季度傳感器校準和高濕熱帶環境年度更換的維護計畫。截至本數據集日期，未發現針對海洋BESS環境中火災探測的馬爾地夫專屬已公布標準——要求為項目專屬。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (fire and gas detection requirements; application to marine environments is project-specific)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum recommended for smoke and heat detectors in Maldives marine BESS environment
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Tests: Test Kb: Salt Mist, Cyclic (qualification testing for detection electronics in marine environments)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations (hazard identification including gas detection and fire detection requirements)

summary.en: Chinese domestic BESS fire detection systems are designed and certified to Chinese fire detection standards (GB 4715, GB 4717 for smoke and heat detectors; GB 15322 for combustible gas detectors) applicable to normal Chinese ambient conditions (up to 55°C, humidity up to 95% RH non-condensing in some ratings). Marine-grade detector specifications (IP54+, salt-mist corrosion resistance, humidity-compensated sensors) are not standard in Chinese domestic BESS detector selections. Chinese domestic BESS project documentation does not typically include salt-mist qualification evidence for fire detection components or tropical-environment maintenance schedules. This gap is significant for Maldives marine BESS applications.
summary.zh: 中国国内BESS火灾探测系统按适用于正常中国环境条件（某些额定值下最高55°C、湿度至95%RH非冷凝）的中国火灾探测标准（GB 4715、GB 4717烟雾和热探测器；GB 15322可燃气体探测器）设计和认证。船用级探测器规格（IP54+、耐盐雾腐蚀性、湿度补偿传感器）在中国国内BESS探测器选型中并非标准配置。中国国内BESS项目文件通常不包含火灾探测部件的盐雾资质证据或热带环境维护计划。这一差距对于马尔代夫海洋BESS应用而言意义重大。
summary.zht: 中國國內BESS火災探測系統按適用於正常中國環境條件（某些額定值下最高55°C、濕度至95%RH非冷凝）的中國火災探測標準（GB 4715、GB 4717煙霧和熱探測器；GB 15322可燃氣體探測器）設計和認證。船用級探測器規格（IP54+、耐鹽霧腐蝕性、濕度補償傳感器）在中國國內BESS探測器選型中並非標準配置。中國國內BESS項目文件通常不包含火災探測部件的鹽霧資質證據或熱帶環境維護計畫。這一差距對於馬爾地夫海洋BESS應用而言意義重大。

standards_or_laws: GB 4715 — 点型感烟火灾探测器 (Point-type Ionization Smoke Detector; Chinese standard)
GB 4717 — 火灾报警控制器 (Fire Alarm Control Unit; Chinese standard)
GB 15322 — 可燃气体探测器 (Combustible Gas Detectors; Chinese standard)

gap.en: Gap: Standard Chinese domestic fire detection equipment certified under GB 4715/4717/15322 is not rated or documented for continuous Maldives marine-environment conditions (salt-mist, humidity above 80%, equatorial ambient heat). Detection system failure in a remote outer-atoll installation is particularly critical given the absence of emergency response. For Maldives BESS projects, exporters and project engineers should: (a) specify fire and gas detection equipment rated IP54 or higher with IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist corrosion qualification; (b) use humidity-compensated electrochemical gas sensors or catalytic bead sensors rated for above 80% RH continuous service; (c) select components with marine-grade connectors and conformal-coated PCBs; (d) prepare a preventive maintenance schedule that includes quarterly sensor calibration and annual sensor replacement — provide this as part of the O&M manual in the project contract.
gap.zh: 差距：在GB 4715/4717/15322下认证的标准中国国内火灾探测设备未针对马尔代夫持续海洋环境条件（盐雾、湿度超过80%、赤道环境热）进行额定或记录。鉴于缺乏紧急响应，偏远外部环礁安装中的探测系统故障尤为关键。对于马尔代夫BESS项目，出口商和项目工程师应：（a）规定IP54或更高防护等级、具备IEC 60068-2-52盐雾腐蚀资质的火灾和气体探测设备；（b）使用额定适用于80%以上RH连续运行的湿度补偿电化学气体传感器或催化珠传感器；（c）选择具有船用级连接器和涂覆PCB的部件；（d）准备包含季度传感器校准和年度传感器更换的预防性维护计划——作为项目合同运维手册的一部分提供。
gap.zht: 差距：在GB 4715/4717/15322下認證的標準中國國內火災探測設備未針對馬爾地夫持續海洋環境條件（鹽霧、濕度超過80%、赤道環境熱）進行額定或記錄。鑑於缺乏緊急響應，偏遠外部環礁安裝中的探測系統故障尤為關鍵。對於馬爾地夫BESS項目，出口商和項目工程師應：（a）規定IP54或更高防護等級、具備IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧腐蝕資質的火災和氣體探測設備；（b）使用額定適用於80%以上RH連續運行的濕度補償電化學氣體傳感器或催化珠傳感器；（c）選擇具有船用級連接器和塗覆PCB的部件；（d）準備包含季度傳感器校準和年度傳感器更換的預防性維護計畫——作為項目合同運維手冊的一部分提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory design requirement in ADB/AIIB project specifications — fire and gas detection is required by NFPA 855 and IEC 62933-5-1; marine-environment rating and maintenance schedule are project-specific requirements arising from Maldives atoll conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese fire code for domestic installations — GB 4715/4717/15322 detectors; not equivalent to marine-rated IP54+ IEC 60068-2-52 qualified detectors required for Maldives

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 60529 (IP Code) and IEC 60068-2-52

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese domestic fire and gas detection equipment certified under GB 4715/4717/15322 is not rated for Maldives marine BESS environments — persistent humidity above 80%, salt-mist exposure, and equatorial heat will degrade standard detectors and increase false-positive and false-negative failure rates. Specify IP54+ marine-rated detection equipment with IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist qualification, humidity-compensated gas sensors, and marine-grade connectors. Include a quarterly calibration and annual replacement maintenance schedule in the O&M manual for all Maldives atoll BESS installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在GB 4715/4717/15322下认证的标准中国国内火灾和气体探测设备未针对马尔代夫海洋BESS环境额定——持续超过80%的湿度、盐雾暴露及赤道高温将降低标准探测器性能并增加误报和漏报故障率。规定具备IEC 60068-2-52盐雾资质、湿度补偿气体传感器及船用级连接器的IP54+船用级探测设备。在所有马尔代夫环礁BESS安装的运维手册中包含季度校准和年度更换维护计划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在GB 4715/4717/15322下認證的標準中國國內火災和氣體探測設備未針對馬爾地夫海洋BESS環境額定——持續超過80%的濕度、鹽霧暴露及赤道高溫將降低標準探測器性能並增加誤報和漏報故障率。規定具備IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧資質、濕度補償氣體傳感器及船用級連接器的IP54+船用級探測設備。在所有馬爾地夫環礁BESS安裝的運維手冊中包含季度校準和年度更換維護計畫。
